events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: a click wrench used upside down/uncalibrated during torque & threaded fastening work. This is a non-compliant practice. An uncalibrated torque wrench cannot reliably achieve specified torque, and using it "upside down" (which can affect the torque reading due to the handle pivot point) is improper. This is a fail.
